description: Canonical 10-turn Ghostlight Relay walkthrough using committed semantic outcomes rather than narrator prose.

quests.summary: Inspect the sparking market beacon in Rooftop Market

director_state.end_goal: Stop the Ghostlight Relay from emptying the district with false evacuation orders.
director_state.end_goal_progress: Next step: Inspect the sparking market beacon.

turns.outcome_summary: The beacon's false orders are proven real.

quests.summary: Ask Nila Vale where the relay draws power

director_updates.end_goal_progress: You confirm the relay is hijacking the district speakers from somewhere deeper in the ward.

memory_updates: The market beacon is broadcasting false evacuation orders tied to the Ghostlight Relay.

turns.input: question Nila Vale about the relay route
turns.outcome_summary: Nila points you toward the Closed Stacks.

quests.summary: Recover the tuning fork from the Closed Stacks

director_updates.end_goal_progress: Nila reveals that a tuning fork in the Closed Stacks can unseal the relay route.

memory_updates: Nila Vale says the relay route can be opened with a tuning fork hidden in the Closed Stacks.

turns.outcome_summary: You reach the sealed archive approach.

director_updates.end_goal_progress: You reach the Closed Stacks where the relay's access tool was hidden away.

memory_updates: The Closed Stacks still hold the warded tools that once serviced the relay line.

turns.input: take the tuning fork from the warded case
turns.outcome_summary: You secure the tuning fork needed for the relay vault.

quests.summary: Carry the tuning fork across Stormglass Causeway

director_updates.end_goal_progress: With the tuning fork in hand, the relay route across Stormglass Causeway is finally reachable.

memory_updates: You recovered the relay tuning fork from the Closed Stacks.

turns.outcome_summary: You approach the exposed causeway with the relay tool.

director_updates.end_goal_progress: You reach Stormglass Causeway and can now make the relay run.

turns.input: cross Stormglass Causeway with the tuning fork
turns.outcome_summary: You survive the causeway and reach the vault approach.

quests.summary: Use the tuning fork to open the Relay Vault

director_updates.end_goal_progress: You reach the relay approach and only the vault door still stands between you and the false signal.

memory_updates: You crossed Stormglass Causeway and reached the relay vault approach.

turns.outcome_summary: You identify where the tuning fork has to be applied.

director_updates.end_goal_progress: The vault lock resonates with the tuning fork's pitch; one precise strike should open it.

turns.input: use the tuning fork to open the relay vault
turns.outcome_summary: The relay vault opens and the core can be changed.

quests.summary: Choose whether to disable or retune the Ghostlight Relay

director_updates.end_goal_progress: The relay core is exposed; your final choice will decide whether the district loses the network or keeps a safer version of it.

memory_updates: You opened the Relay Vault and exposed the Ghostlight core.

turns.input: study the relay core before choosing
turns.outcome_summary: You learn the relay can be retuned instead of destroyed.

director_updates.end_goal_progress: You discover the relay can be retuned to carry truthful district warnings instead of being shut down outright.

memory_updates: The Ghostlight Relay can be retuned into a truthful warning network instead of destroyed.

turns.input: retune the Ghostlight Relay to broadcast real warnings
turns.outcome_summary: You retune the relay and preserve the district warning network.

quests.summary: Choose whether to disable or retune the Ghostlight Relay

director_updates.end_goal_progress: The Ghostlight Relay now carries truthful warnings, and the district keeps its signal network without the panic loop.

memory_updates: You retuned the Ghostlight Relay so the district keeps a truthful warning network.

quests.summary: Choose whether to disable or retune the Ghostlight Relay

expected_final_state.end_goal_progress: The Ghostlight Relay now carries truthful warnings, and the district keeps its signal network without the panic loop.
